        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ext-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="Must have either extensions or value[x], not both"/>
        <expression value="extension.exists() != value.exists()"/>
        <xpath
               value="exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), &quot;value&quot;)])"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="n/a"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.focalDevice:seedDevice.modifierExtension">
      <path value="Procedure.focalDevice.modifierExtension"/>
      <short value="Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized"/>
      <definition
                  value="May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element and that modifies the understanding of the element in which it is contained and/or the understanding of the containing element's descendants. Usually modifier elements provide negation or qualification. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension. Applications processing a resource are required to check for modifier extensions.

Modifier extensions SHALL NOT change the meaning of any elements on Resource or DomainResource (including cannot change the meaning of modifierExtension itself)."/>
      <comment
               value="There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone."/>
      <requirements
                    value="Modifier extensions allow for extensions that *cannot* be safely ignored to be clearly distinguished from the vast majority of extensions which can be safely ignored.  This promotes interoperability by eliminating the need for implementers to prohibit the presence of extensions. For further information, see the [definition of modifier extensions](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html#modifierExtension)."/>
      <alias value="extensions"/>
      <alias value="user content"/>
      <alias value="modifiers"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="BackboneElement.modifierExtension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Extension"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ext-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="Must have either extensions or value[x], not both"/>
        <expression value="extension.exists() != value.exists()"/>
        <xpath
               value="exists(f:extension)!=exists(f:*[starts-with(local-name(.), &quot;value&quot;)])"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Extension"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="true"/>
      <isModifierReason
                        value="Modifier extensions are expected to modify the meaning or interpretation of the element that contains them"/>
      <isSummary value="true"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="N/A"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.focalDevice:seedDevice.action">
      <path value="Procedure.focalDevice.action"/>
      <short value="Kind of change to device"/>
      <definition
                  value="The kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Procedure.focalDevice.action"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="CodeableConcept"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <binding>
        <extension
                   url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName">
          <valueString value="DeviceActionKind"/>
        </extension>
        <strength value="preferred"/>
        <description
                     value="A kind of change that happened to the device during the procedure."/>
        <valueSet value="http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/device-action"/>
      </binding>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map
             value=".inboundRelationship[typeCode=SUBJ].source[classCode=OBS, moodCode=EVN, code=&quot;procedure device action&quot;].value=:procedure device action codes"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.focalDevice:seedDevice.manipulated">
      <path value="Procedure.focalDevice.manipulated"/>
      <short value="Device that was changed"/>
      <definition
                  value="The device that was manipulated (changed) during the procedure."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Procedure.focalDevice.manipulated"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/codex-radiation-therapy/StructureDefinition/codexrt-radiotherapy-seed-device"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value=".participation[typeCode=DEV].role[classCode=SDLOC]"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.usedReference">
      <path value="Procedure.usedReference"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="profile"/>
          <path value="$this.resolve()"/>
        </discriminator>
        <description value="Slicing based on the profile"/>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <short value="Items used during procedure"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies medications, devices and any other substance used as part of the procedure."/>
      <comment
               value="For devices actually implanted or removed, use Procedure.device."/>
      <requirements value="Used for tracking contamination, etc."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Procedure.usedReference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Device"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Medication"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Substance"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map
             value=".participation[typeCode=DEV].role[classCode=MANU] or
.participation[typeCode=CSM].role[classCode=ADMM] (for Medication or Substance)"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.usedReference:treatmentDevice">
      <path value="Procedure.usedReference"/>
      <sliceName value="treatmentDevice"/>
      <short value="Radiotherapy Treatment Device used as part of therapy."/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies medications, devices and any other substance used as part of the procedure."/>
      <comment
               value="For devices actually implanted or removed, use Procedure.device."/>
      <requirements value="Used for tracking contamination, etc."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Procedure.usedReference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://hl7.org/fhir/us/codex-radiation-therapy/StructureDefinition/codexrt-radiotherapy-treatment-device"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map
             value=".participation[typeCode=DEV].role[classCode=MANU] or
.participation[typeCode=CSM].role[classCode=ADMM] (for Medication or Substance)"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.usedCode">
      <path value="Procedure.usedCode"/>
      <short value="Coded items used during the procedure"/>
      <definition
                  value="Identifies coded items that were used as part of the procedure."/>
      <comment
               value="For devices actually implanted or removed, use Procedure.device."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Procedure.usedCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="CodeableConcept"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="ele-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="All FHIR elements must have a @value or children"/>
        <expression
                    value="hasValue() or (children().count() &gt; id.count())"/>
        <xpath value="@value|f:*|h:div"/>
        <source value="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Element"/>
      </constraint>
      <isModifier value="false"/>
      <isSummary value="false"/>
      <binding>
        <extension
                   url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-bindingName">
          <valueString value="ProcedureUsed"/>
        </extension>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <description value="Codes describing items used during a procedure."/>
        <valueSet value="http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/device-kind"/>
      </binding>
      <mapping>
        <identity value="rim"/>
        <map value="participation[typeCode=Dev].role[classCode=MANU]"/>
      </mapping>
    </element>
  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="Procedure">
      <path value="Procedure"/>
      <constraint>
        <key value="aria-treated-plan-status"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="Only the following status values are supported for Radiotherapy Treated Plan from ARIA: draft | in-progress | stopped | completed."/>
        <expression
                    value="status = 'draft' or status = 'in-progress' or status = 'stopped' or status = 'completed'"/>
        <source
                value="http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyTreatedPlan"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.id">
      <path value="Procedure.id"/>
      <short
             value="Resource id assigned by ARIA. This id is used to reference this resource from other resources.
  Do not use this id or parts of it for other purposes. See element 'identifier' instead."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.meta.versionId">
      <path value="Procedure.meta.versionId"/>
      <short value="Revision number that is updated with each modification."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.meta.lastUpdated">
      <path value="Procedure.meta.lastUpdated"/>
      <short value="Date and time of the last treatment in this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.meta.profile">
      <path value="Procedure.meta.profile"/>
      <short value="Profiles that this resource complies to."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.extension:modalityAndTechnique">
      <path value="Procedure.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="modalityAndTechnique"/>
      <short value="Modality and technique of the plan."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:modality">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="modality"/>
      <short
             value="Treatment modality mapped to mCODE compliant modality code where possible."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:technique">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="technique"/>
      <short
             value="Treatment technique mapped to mCODE compliant modality code where possible"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:radiotherapyEnergyOrIsotope">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="radiotherapyEnergyOrIsotope"/>
      <short value="Currently not available from ARIA."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:modalityAndTechnique.extension:radiotherapyTreatmentApplicatorType">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="radiotherapyTreatmentApplicatorType"/>
      <short value="Currently not available from ARIA."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.extension:fractionsDelivered">
      <path value="Procedure.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="fractionsDelivered"/>
      <short value="Number of delivered fractions with this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume">
      <path value="Procedure.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="doseDeliveredToVolume"/>
      <short
             value="Dose delivered so far to each Reference Point that received a dose contribution from this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:volume">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="volume"/>
      <short
             value="Radiotherapy Volume representing the Reference Point in ARIA."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:volume.value[x]">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension.value[x]"/>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyVolume"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:volume.value[x].display">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension.value[x].display"/>
      <short value="Display name for the Reference Point in ARIA."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:totalDoseDelivered">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="totalDoseDelivered"/>
      <short
             value="Total dose delivered in [cGy] so far to this Reference Point from this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:pointDose">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="pointDose"/>
      <short
             value="Whether the Reference Point has a location defined in an image."/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.extension:doseDeliveredToVolume.extension:primaryPlanDose">
      <path value="Procedure.extension.extension"/>
      <sliceName value="primaryPlanDose"/>
      <short
             value="Whether the Reference Points is the primary Reference Point in this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.identifier">
      <path value="Procedure.identifier"/>
      <short value="See slice descriptions."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.identifier:displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.identifier"/>
      <sliceName value="displayName"/>
      <short
             value="Display name is the Plan ID in ARIA. Treatment approved plans must have a Plan ID that is unique in the Course."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.identifier:displayName.system">
      <path value="Procedure.identifier.system"/>
      <patternUri
                  value="http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/radiotherapyPlanId"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.identifier:official">
      <path value="Procedure.identifier"/>
      <sliceName value="official"/>
      <short
             value="ARIA identifier that is unique for this instance of ARIA and serves as primary database key."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.identifier:official.system">
      <path value="Procedure.identifier.system"/>
      <patternUri
                  value="http://varian.com/fhir/identifier/RadiotherapyPlan/RadOnc-Id"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.basedOn">
      <path value="Procedure.basedOn"/>
      <short value="See slicing in base profile."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.basedOn:treatment-plan">
      <path value="Procedure.basedOn"/>
      <sliceName value="treatment-plan"/>
      <short value="ARIA references the Radiotherapy Treatment Plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.basedOn:phase-prescription">
      <path value="Procedure.basedOn"/>
      <sliceName value="phase-prescription"/>
      <short value="Prescription to which this plan is linked."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code value="Reference"/>
        <targetProfile
                       value="http://varian.com/fhir/v1/StructureDefinition/RadiotherapyPhasePrescription"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.partOf">
      <path value="Procedure.partOf"/>
      <short value="See slicing in base profile."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.partOf:course-summary">
      <path value="Procedure.partOf"/>
      <sliceName value="course-summary"/>
      <short value="ARIA references the Radiotherapy Course Summary."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.partOf:treated-phase">
      <path value="Procedure.partOf"/>
      <sliceName value="treated-phase"/>
      <short value="ARIA references the Radiotherapy Treated Phase."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.status">
      <path value="Procedure.status"/>
      <short value="Status of the plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.category">
      <path value="Procedure.category"/>
      <short value="Fixed code for radiotherapy defined by CodeX RT."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code">
      <path value="Procedure.code"/>
      <short
             value="Fixed code for radiotherapy treatment plan defined by CodeX RT."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.subject">
      <path value="Procedure.subject"/>
      <short
             value="Patient who receives or received the radiotherapy treatment described in this resource."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.subject.display">
      <path value="Procedure.subject.display"/>
      <short value="Name of the patient 'Last Name, First Name'."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.performed[x].start">
      <path value="Procedure.performed[x].start"/>
      <short value="Date of the first treatment with this plan."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.performed[x].end">
      <path value="Procedure.performed[x].end"/>
      <short
             value="Date of that latest treatment with this plan at the time this summary was created. If additional treatments are delivered with this plan, then this end date is updated accordingly."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.reasonCode">
      <path value="Procedure.reasonCode"/>
      <short
             value="Codes of the assigned diagoses. Note that in ARIA, multiple alternative codes may be assigned to each single diagnosis."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.reasonReference">
      <path value="Procedure.reasonReference"/>
      <short
             value="References to the Condition resources that represent the assigned diagnoses. May reference multiple Condition resources for the same diagnosis if alternative code systems are used."/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.bodySite">
      <path value="Procedure.bodySite"/>
      <short
             value="Mapped from the prescription site in ARIA. Prescription site in ARIA is a pick list that can be changed by the user. Therefore, it is not always possible to map the prescription site to an mCODE compliant code."/>
      <max value="0"/>
    </element>
  </differential>
</StructureDefinition>

Links: Table of Contents
